corrected_fields.summary: This page is a static listing of academic researchers who have visited the Bank of England through its Research Visitor Programme from 2017 to 2025. It contains no policy announcements, data releases, or analysis relevant to macro catalysts or market structure. The most recent visitor listed is Ester Faia (November 2025) and Julian Di Giovanni (October 2025).
